nasb.text: Do not forget the voice of Your adversaries, The uproar of those who rise against You which ascends continually.

esv.text: Do not forget the clamor of your foes, the uproar of those who rise against you, which goes up continually!

cnv.text: 求你不要忘記你敵人的聲音， 不要忘記那些起來與你為敵的人不住加劇地喧鬧。

ccb.text: 不要对你仇敌的喧嚷置之不理， 与你为敌的人不停地叫嚣。

csbs.text: 不要忘记你敌人的声音—— 那些起来敌对你之人的喧嚷一直上升！
